title: Comments should not be located at the end of lines of code
description: Comments at the end of lines of code can make the code harder to read and maintain.
message: A comment was found at the end of a line.
recommendation: Move comments to a new line.

noncompliant.code: x = 1 # This is a comment at the end of the line

compliant.code:
x = 1
# This is a comment on a new line

why_is_this_an_issue: Comments at the end of a line can clutter the code and make it harder to read.
how_to_fix: Move comments to the beginning of the next line or remove unnecessary comments.
